title: Verify TV power on via remote control
description: Confirm the TV is in standby mode. Press the Power button on the remote. Verify the panel backlight activates and the home screen loads within 15 seconds. Confirm the active application is the Vizio home page.
preconditions:
• TV is in standby (panel backlight off)
• Remote control is functional
detailed_description: With the TV in standby, press the Power key on the remote. Confirm the panel backlight activates within 15 seconds. Press Home and confirm the Home Screen loads with 'APPS & INPUTS' visible. Confirm the active app is the Vizio Home Page.
detailed_expected_output: Panel backlight turns on within 15 seconds of Power key press. 'APPS & INPUTS' text visible on Home Screen. Active app confirms Vizio Home Page.

title: Verify TV power off to standby via remote
description: While the TV is powered ON and displaying content, press the Power button on the remote. Verify the panel gracefully turns OFF and the screen becomes blank, confirming transition to standby mode.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON and Home Screen is active ('APPS & INPUTS' visible)
• Remote control is functional
detailed_description: With the TV on and Home Screen displayed, press the Power key. Confirm the panel backlight turns off within 15 seconds and screen goes blank, confirming standby. Wait 5 seconds then wake the TV back to avoid suspending the test service.
detailed_expected_output: Panel backlight turns off within 15 seconds. Screen is blank confirming standby. TV recovers to ON state after the 5-second standby period.

title: Verify TV resume from Quick Start standby mode
description: Set the TV to Quick Start power mode. Put the TV into standby. Immediately wake it using the remote. Verify instant-on behavior and home screen loads within 5 seconds.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON and Home Screen is active ('APPS & INPUTS' visible)
• Remote control is paired and functional
• Quick Start standby mode is enabled on the TV
detailed_description:
Verify the TV can enter Quick Start standby and resume correctly using the Power key on the remote.

Before pressing Power, confirm the TV is in the ON state and the Home Screen is active. Press the Power key to put the TV into Quick Start standby. Confirm the panel backlight turns off within 10 sec
detailed_expected_output: Panel backlight turns off within 10 seconds of pressing Power to enter standby. Panel backlight turns back on within 15 seconds of the wake Power press. Home Screen loads with 'APPS & INPUTS' visible

title: Verify TV power cycle stability (10 consecutive cycles)
description: Perform 10 consecutive power on/off cycles using the remote with 30-second intervals between cycles. Verify each cycle completes successfully without delays, boot failures, or display issues.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON and Home Screen is active ('APPS & INPUTS' visible)
• Remote control is functional
detailed_description: Perform 10 consecutive power on/off cycles using the remote. Before starting, confirm the TV is ON with Home Screen active. For each cycle: press Power to enter standby, wait 5 seconds, press Power to wake, confirm the panel turns back on and the Home Screen loads with 'APPS & INPUTS' before startin
detailed_expected_output: All 10 cycles complete without failure. Each cycle: panel off within 10s, panel on within 15s of wake, 'APPS & INPUTS' visible before next cycle. No boot failures or display issues. Final state is Hom

title: Verify 4K resolution display output
description: Play 4K content or connect a 4K source. Navigate to System Information and verify the display resolution shows 3840x2160.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON
• 4K content source available (streaming app or 4K HDMI source)
detailed_description: With 4K content playing, navigate to System Information in Settings and verify the display resolution shows 3840x2160.
detailed_expected_output: System Information screen shows '3840' and '2160' confirming 4K output path is functional.

title: Verify 1080p resolution display output
description: Connect a 1080p source to HDMI. Switch to that input and verify content displays correctly with proper upscaling to the native panel resolution.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON
• 1080p source device connected to an HDMI port and powered on
detailed_description: Switch the TV to the HDMI input with the 1080p source connected. Verify content displays correctly with the TV scaling it to the native panel resolution.
detailed_expected_output: TV switches to the 1080p HDMI input. Active video content displayed confirming signal received and upscaled correctly.

title: Verify HDR10 content display
description: Play HDR10 content from a streaming app or HDMI source. Verify the HDR indicator appears on screen and content renders correctly.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON
• HDR10 content source available (streaming app or HDMI source)
detailed_description: Play HDR10 content from a streaming app or HDMI source. Verify the HDR indicator appears on screen and video is playing without issues.
detailed_expected_output: Video state confirms Playing. HDR indicator detected on screen. Content renders correctly with HDR active.

title: Verify Dolby Vision content rendering
description: Play Dolby Vision content. Verify the Dolby Vision logo/indicator displays and content renders with proper dynamic metadata.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON
• Dolby Vision content source available
detailed_description: Play Dolby Vision content. Verify the Dolby Vision indicator is visible on screen and content renders correctly.
detailed_expected_output: Video state confirms Playing. Dolby Vision indicator detected on screen. Content renders with Dolby Vision active.

title: Verify Picture Mode switching
description: Navigate to Picture Settings and cycle through all picture modes (Calibrated, Vivid, Sports, etc.). Verify each mode applies correctly and switching is smooth with validating the modes
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON and Home Screen is active
• Picture settings accessible via Settings menu
detailed_description: Navigate to Picture Settings and cycle through all available picture modes: Calibrated, Calibrated Dark, Vivid, Sports, Normal (or as available on this model). For each mode, select it and confirm the system registry reflects the change before moving to the next.
detailed_expected_output: Each picture mode applies successfully, confirmed by the picture mode system registry value matching the selected mode. No hangs or crashes. All modes apply within 10 seconds each.

title: Verify brightness adjustment across range
description: Navigate to Brightness setting. Adjust from minimum (0) to maximum (100). Verify smooth brightness response across the full range.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON
• Home Screen displaying ('APPS & INPUTS' visible)
• Picture settings accessible via Menu key
• ⚠️ Exact Brightness or Backlight menu item name must be verified
  from the TV's Pict
detailed_description: Navigate to the Brightness setting in the Picture menu. Adjust from minimum (0) to maximum (100) and verify smooth brightness response across the full range, confirmed by the system registry reflecting each change. For Phase 1, only system registry state changes need to be verified — no visual or pi
detailed_expected_output: Brightness adjustments are applied without errors. System registry value for the brightness or backlight setting increases when adjusted upward with the Right key and decreases when adjusted with the

title: Verify contrast adjustment across range
description: Navigate to Contrast setting. Adjust from minimum to maximum. Verify black and white levels respond appropriately with increased dynamic range.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON and Home Screen is active
• Contrast setting accessible in Picture menu
detailed_description: Navigate to the Contrast setting in the Picture menu and adjust from minimum to maximum. Verify adjustments apply without any blank or frozen screen at any level.
detailed_expected_output: Contrast adjusts across the full range without blank or frozen screen. Each adjustment applies without error or hang.

title: Verify internal speaker audio output
description: Select TV internal speakers. Play content and verify clear audio output by reading from system registry keys
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON
• Internal speakers selected as audio output
• Volume above 0, not muted
• Content is playing
detailed_description: With internal speakers as the audio output, confirm the volume is above 0 and audio is not muted. Confirm no soundbar is enabled. Verify content is playing confirming the internal speaker audio path is active.
detailed_expected_output: Internal speakers confirmed as audio output (soundbar not enabled). Volume above 0. Audio unmuted. Content playing confirming active internal speaker path.

title: Verify volume adjustment via remote
description: While playing content, adjust volume using Volume Up/Down buttons. Verify smooth incremental changes and on-screen indicator updates correctly.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON and Home Screen is active ('APPS & INPUTS' visible)
• TV is not muted
• Volume is at a mid-range level (e.g. 50) so 5 steps up and 5 steps down
  both stay within the 0–100 range
•
detailed_description:
From the Home Screen, press Volume Up five times and confirm the volume increases by 5 units. Then press Volume Down five times and confirm the volume returns to its original level.

Starting from the Home Screen, record the initial volume level. Press Volume Up once — confirm volume is now initial
detailed_expected_output: Volume increases by exactly 1 unit per Volume Up press, confirmed after each key press. On-screen volume OSD indicator is visible during adjustment. Volume decreases by exactly 1 unit per Volume Down

title: Verify mute/unmute functionality
description: During audio playback, press Mute button. Verify audio mutes with on-screen indicator. Press Mute again to unmute at previous volume level.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON and audio is playing
• Volume above 0 and not muted
detailed_description: From the Home Screen with audio playing, press the Mute key. Confirm audio mutes and the on-screen mute indicator is visible. Press Mute again to unmute and confirm volume returns to the original level.
detailed_expected_output: Mute state confirmed after first Mute press. On-screen mute indicator visible. Unmuted state confirmed after second Mute press. Volume returns to original level.

title: Verify Wi-Fi 2.4GHz network connection
description: Navigate to Network settings and connect to a 2.4GHz Wi-Fi network. Verify successful connection and IP assignment.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON and Home Screen is active
• 2.4GHz Wi-Fi network available with known SSID and password
detailed_description: Navigate to Network Settings and connect to a 2.4GHz Wi-Fi network. Enter the SSID and password, confirm 'Connected' status and valid IP address assignment.
detailed_expected_output: Wi-Fi SSID detected in network list. 'Connected' status text visible after authentication. Network status confirms connected. Valid IP address assigned.

title: Verify Wi-Fi 5GHz network connection
description: Connect to a 5GHz Wi-Fi network. Verify stable connection and ability to play 4K content without buffering.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON and connected to 5GHz Wi-Fi
• 4K streaming content available
detailed_description:
Verify TV display is ON using sysreg /hw/power/panel = HAL_PANEL_AND_BACKLIGHT_ON.
Go to Home and confirm Home screen by checking APPS & INPUTS.
Open Quick Settings with Menu, focus All Settings, and enter All Settings.
Navigate to Network and enter Network menu.
Confirm target SSID VZ_LAB is visibl
detailed_expected_output: 5GHz SSID shown as connected. 4K content plays for 30 seconds without buffering. Media state remains Playing throughout.

title: Verify Wi-Fi 6GHz network connection (Wi-Fi 6E SKUs)
description: For Wi-Fi 6E models, connect to a 6GHz network and verify high-throughput performance.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON
• TV model supports Wi-Fi 6E (skip if not supported)
• 6GHz Wi-Fi network available
detailed_description: Confirm this TV model supports Wi-Fi 6E. Connect to a 6GHz Wi-Fi network and verify stable connection. Play streaming content to confirm the high-throughput path is functional.
detailed_expected_output:
Steps:

GoHome and ensure TV is powered ON and TV model supports Wi-Fi 6E
Connect to a 6GHz Wi-Fi network
Play streaming content to confirm high-throughput path
Return to Home Screen

Expected Result:

title: Verify Ethernet (RJ45) network connection
description: Connect Ethernet cable to RJ45 port. Verify automatic connection, IP assignment, and internet access.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON
• Ethernet cable connected to TV's RJ45 port
detailed_description: With Ethernet cable connected, verify the TV automatically connects, assigns a valid IP address, and internet access is functional. Check Network Information to confirm.
detailed_expected_output: Network status confirms connected within 30 seconds. 'Wired' or 'Ethernet' connection type shown. Valid IP address displayed. Internet access confirmed.

description:

Verify "IPv4 Address" label is present and value matche

title: Verify DNS resolution and internet access
description: With network connected, launch Netflix and verify the app loads successfully, confirming DNS and internet functionality.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON and connected to internet
• Netflix app installed
detailed_description: With the TV connected to the internet, launch Netflix and verify it loads successfully, confirming DNS resolution and internet access.
detailed_expected_output: Network confirmed connected. Netflix launches and UI renders within 30 seconds. Netflix text detected. Browse or Home UI elements confirm full app load with working DNS and internet.

title: Verify WPA2/WPA3 encryption authentication
description: Connect to both WPA2 and WPA3 networks successfully and verify stable connection.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON
• WPA2-secured network available
• WPA3-secured network available
detailed_description: Connect the TV to a WPA2-secured network. Confirm 'Connected' status. Then switch to a WPA3-secured network and confirm 'Connected' status. Verify both connections maintain stability.
detailed_expected_output: WPA2 connects successfully — 'Connected' text and status confirmed. WPA3 connects successfully — 'Connected' text and status confirmed. Both stable.

title: Verify network information display (IP, MAC)
description: Navigate to Network Information and verify all details (IP, MAC, connection type, signal strength) are displayed correctly.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON and connected to a network
• Network Information accessible via Settings
detailed_description: Navigate to Network Information in Settings and verify all detail fields are displayed: IP address, MAC address, connection type, signal strength, and connection status.
detailed_expected_output: Network Information screen loads. IP address, MAC address, connection type, signal strength, and status fields all present and populated. Status shows 'Connected'.

title: Verify IR remote key response (all keys)
description: Test all keys on the remote keys (Power, Home, Volume, D-pad, etc.). Verify each key produces the expected response.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON and Home Screen is active
• IR remote functional and pointed at TV
detailed_description: Test primary remote keys one by one: press Home and confirm Home Screen loads; press Volume Up/Down and confirm volume changes by 1 unit each press; press Mute and confirm mute toggles with on-screen indicator; press D-pad directions and confirm focus moves; press Enter and confirm action; press Bac
detailed_expected_output: Home key: 'APPS & INPUTS' visible. Volume Up/Down: volume changes by 1 each press. Mute: mute state toggles with on-screen indicator. D-pad: focus changes on each press. Enter: action triggered. Back:

title: Verify BT remote reconnection after power cycle
description: Power cycle the TV with a paired BT remote. Verify the remote automatically reconnects without manual intervention.
preconditions:
• TV is in standby
• Bluetooth remote is already paired to the TV
detailed_description: With the TV in standby and the BT remote paired, press the Power key on the BT remote to wake the TV. Verify the TV responds and Home Screen loads without requiring manual re-pairing.
detailed_expected_output: TV wakes from standby with panel ON. BT remote Home key produces Home Screen response within 10 seconds. 'APPS & INPUTS' visible without manual re-pairing.

title: Verify navigation D-pad functionality
description: Use D-pad and OK button to navigate menus. Verify smooth, responsive navigation with clear focus movement.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON and Settings menu accessible
• Remote D-pad and Enter keys functional
detailed_description: From the Home Screen, open Settings and navigate using the D-pad. Press Down to move focus, Up to return, Enter to open an item, Back to return. Verify each D-pad press produces a visible focus change and navigation is smooth.
detailed_expected_output: Each D-pad direction moves focus to the expected item. Enter opens the focused item. Back returns to previous screen. No missed inputs, no ghosting, no lag.

title: Verify volume up/down key response
description: Press Volume Up and Volume Down keys. Verify volume changes incrementally and OSD updates in real-time.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON
• Home Screen displaying ('APPS & INPUTS' visible)
• Audio is not muted (/tv_settings/audio/mute = false)
• Volume is at a mid-range level (not 0 or 100) so a single step
  in eithe
detailed_description: Press Volume Up and Volume Down keys on the remote and verify volume changes incrementally with the OSD updating in real-time. This test validates that each individual remote key press produces a precise 1-unit change, confirming the remote key signal path to the audio subsystem is working correctly
detailed_expected_output: Volume system registry (/tv_settings/audio/volume) increments by exactly 1 after a single Volume Up key press, confirmed within 2 seconds. OSD 'Volume' indicator is detected via text search. Volume sy

title: Verify channel up/down key response
description: While viewing antenna/WatchFree+ content, press Channel Up/Down. Verify channels change with banner display.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON
• WatchFree+ accessible or antenna content available
• Multiple channels available
detailed_description: Launch WatchFree+ and confirm content is playing. Press Channel Up and verify the channel changes to a different program within 3 seconds. Press Channel Down and verify the channel changes again within 3 seconds.
detailed_expected_output: WatchFree+ launches and content loads. Channel Up produces a different channel or program within 3 seconds. Channel Down produces a different channel or program within 3 seconds.

title: Verify app shortcut keys (Netflix, etc.)
description: Press dedicated app shortcut buttons (Netflix, Disney, Hulu). Verify each launches the correct app directly.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON and Home Screen is active
• Netflix, Disney+, and Hulu apps installed
• Internet connected
detailed_description: From the Home Screen, press the Netflix shortcut key and verify Netflix launches within 30 seconds. Return to Home Screen. Press Disney+ shortcut key and verify Disney+ launches within 30 seconds. Return. Press Hulu shortcut key and verify Hulu launches within 30 seconds.
detailed_expected_output: Netflix launches within 30 seconds with Netflix text visible. Disney+ launches within 30 seconds. Hulu launches within 30 seconds. Each shortcut opens the correct app directly.

title: Verify HDMI 1 port detection and video output
description: Connect source to HDMI 1. Verify signal detection, input switching.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON
• Source device connected to HDMI 1 and powered on
detailed_description: Switch the TV to HDMI 1 input. Verify the signal is detected, the input is active, and video content from the source device is displayed.
detailed_expected_output: HDMI 1 signal confirmed as connected with signal detected. Current input confirms hdmi1. Active video content displayed.

title: Verify HDMI 2 port detection and video output
description: Connect source to HDMI 2. Verify signal detection, input switching.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON
• Source device connected to HDMI 2 and powered on
detailed_description: Switch the TV to HDMI 2 input. Verify the signal is detected, the input is active, and video content from the source device is displayed.
detailed_expected_output: HDMI 2 signal confirmed as connected with signal detected. Current input confirms hdmi2. Active video content displayed.

title: Verify HDMI 3 port detection and video output
description: Connect source to HDMI 3. Verify signal detection, input switching.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON
• Source device connected to HDMI 3 and powered on
detailed_description: Switch the TV to HDMI 3 input. Verify the signal is detected, the input is active, and video content from the source device is displayed.
detailed_expected_output: HDMI 3 signal confirmed as connected with signal detected. Current input confirms hdmi3. Active video content displayed.

title: Verify HDMI 4 port detection and video output
description: Connect source to HDMI 4 (if available). Verify signal detection, input switching, and video display.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON
• Source device connected to HDMI 4 and powered on
• Skip test if HDMI 4 port is not present on this model
detailed_description: Switch the TV to HDMI 4 input. Verify the signal is detected, the input is active, and video content from the source device is displayed.
detailed_expected_output: HDMI 4 signal confirmed as connected with signal detected. (or test skipped if port absent) Current input confirms hdmi4. Active video content displayed.

title: Verify HDMI-CEC device discovery
description: Connect CEC device as raw input. verify CEC function by default Enable and only then allow to search for device.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON
• CEC-capable device connected to HDMI port
• HDMI-CEC enabled in Settings
detailed_description: With HDMI-CEC enabled, confirm the TV discovers the connected CEC device. Navigate to the input menu and verify the device name appears instead of the generic 'HDMI X' label.
detailed_expected_output: CEC enabled confirmed via text search. Device name appears in input menu instead of generic HDMI label, confirmed via text search.

title: Verify HDMI-CEC one-touch play
description: With CEC device function enabled , press Play on the external device. Verify TV auto-switches to that input possible only with one touch play enabled..
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON
• CEC device connected to HDMI port
• HDMI-CEC enabled
detailed_description: With CEC enabled and a CEC device connected, press Play on the external device. Verify the TV automatically switches to that HDMI input within 15 seconds and displays the device content. this functionality possible only when one touch play enable. by default it's disable.
detailed_expected_output: TV auto-switches to the CEC device's HDMI input within 15 seconds. Active video content from the CEC device is displayed. which can be possible with One touch play enable only.

title: Verify HDMI-CEC system standby
description:
With CEC enabled, put TV in standby. Verify CEC commands are sent properly.
(NOTE: CEC standby and a regular power-off both end up updating the same /hw/power/panel key.)
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON
• CEC device connected to HDMI port
• HDMI-CEC enabled
detailed_description: With CEC enabled, press Power on the remote to put the TV in standby. Verify the CEC system standby command is processed and the panel turns off. After 5 seconds, wake the TV and verify it returns to the Home Screen.
detailed_expected_output: Panel turns off confirming standby. CEC system standby command processed. TV wakes and Home Screen loads.

title: Verify HDMI input auto-switching
description: Enable auto input switching. Connect/power on HDMI device. Verify TV automatically switches to the active input.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON
• Auto input switching enabled in HDMI Settings
• HDMI device connected but powered off
detailed_description: With auto input switching enabled, power on the connected HDMI device. Verify the TV automatically switches to that HDMI input within 15 seconds without manual input selection.
detailed_expected_output: Current input changes to the active HDMI port within 15 seconds. Signal detected. Non-blank screen from auto-switched input. No manual intervention required.

title: Verify HDMI port naming persistence
description: Rename an HDMI input. Power cycle the TV and verify the custom name is retained.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON
• HDMI input visible in input menu
detailed_description: Navigate to HDMI Settings and rename an HDMI input to 'Game Console'. Confirm the custom name is visible. Power cycle the TV and verify 'Game Console' is still shown in the input menu.
detailed_expected_output: Game Console' custom name visible in input menu after rename. Custom name persists after power cycle, confirmed via text search.

title: Verify antenna port channel scan
description: Connect antenna. Run channel scan and verify ATSC channels are discovered successfully.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON
• Antenna cable connected to RF input port
• Broadcast signal available
detailed_description: Navigate to Antenna Channels in Settings and run a channel scan. Confirm the scan initiates, runs to completion, and ATSC channels are discovered.
detailed_expected_output: Channel scan initiates with 'Scanning' text visible. Scan completes within 300 seconds. Channel count or completion text confirms channels were discovered.

title: Verify ATSC tuner channel reception
description: Tune to a scanned antenna channel. Verify video and audio play correctly.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON
• Antenna channel scan completed
• At least one ATSC channel available
detailed_description: Tune to a scanned antenna channel. Verify video and audio are playing correctly from the antenna feed.
detailed_expected_output: Non-blank screen with active video from antenna. Video is not stalled. Audio path is active — volume above 0 and not muted.

title: Verify channel up/down tuning
description: While viewing antenna content, press Channel Up/Down. Verify channels change properly.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON and viewing an antenna channel
• Multiple channels available
detailed_description:
Verify TV panel is ON using sysreg check for /hw/power/panel = HAL_PANEL_AND_BACKLIGHT_ON.
Go to Home and confirm APPS & INPUTS is visible.
Open Quick Settings using Menu.
Confirm Quick Settings opened by finding All Settings.
Focus All Settings and press Enter.
Confirm All Settings screen loaded by
detailed_expected_output: Channel Up changes to a different channel within 3 seconds. Channel Down changes to a different channel within 3 seconds. Video displayed on each channel.

title: Verify MAC address assignment (WLAN/Ethernet)
description:
Navigate to Network Information. Verify MAC addresses for Wi-Fi and Ethernet are displayed correctly.
Step 1: GoHome and ensure TV is powered ON .

Step 2: Navigate to Network Information: Menu → All Settings → Network → Network Information

Step 3: Verify MAC and ip address values displayed for Wi-
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON and Navigate to homescreen and verify connected to a network
• Network Information accessible via Settings
detailed_description: Navigate to Network Information in Settings. Verify MAC addresses for Wi-Fi and Ethernet are displayed and follow the correct format (XX:XX:XX:XX:XX:XX).
detailed_expected_output:
Steps:

Verify network is connected via sysreg /hw/network/status = UP (exitLoop on failure)
Navigate to Settings > Network > Network Information
before going to Network verify the network type via sy

title: Verify serial number format compliance
description: Navigate to System Information. Verify serial number is displayed and follows correct format.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON
• Serial number programmed during factory provisioning
detailed_description: Navigate to TV Information in Settings > System. Verify the serial number field is displayed and populated with a non-empty value.
detailed_expected_output: Serial Number field visible on System Information screen. Field is populated and non-blank.

title: Verify ULPK ID configuration
description: Check system information for ULPK/ULI ID. Verify it is properly programmed.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON
• ULPK/ULI ID programmed during factory provisioning
detailed_description: Navigate to TV Information in Settings > System. Verify the ULPK or ULI ID field is present and populated, confirming the key was programmed correctly at the factory.
detailed_expected_output: ULPK or ULI text found via text search confirming field exists and is populated. ESN system registry key returns a non-empty value confirming ULPK is programmed.

title: Verify NOC device registration
description: With internet connected, verify the TV successfully registers with the Vizio NOC.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON and connected to internet
• Serial number and ULPK programmed
detailed_description: With internet connected, verify the TV's device identifier is available and the TV successfully registers with Vizio NOC. Confirm registration status via system info or status text.
detailed_expected_output: Network confirmed connected. ESN/device identifier is non-empty. Registration status or account linkage visible, confirming successful NOC registration.

title: Verify OOBE firmware update check
description: During initial OOBE setup, verify firmware update check occurs when connected to network.
preconditions:
• TV on first boot or after factory reset
• Internet connection available during OOBE
detailed_description: During OOBE with the TV connected to internet, verify the firmware update check occurs automatically at the appropriate OOBE step. Confirm either a download begins or an up-to-date message is shown.
detailed_expected_output: Firmware update check initiated during OOBE, confirmed by 'Update' or related text. Download starts or 'up to date' status confirmed.

title: Verify menu Check-for-Updates functionality
description: Navigate to Settings > System > Check for Updates. Initiate manual check and verify status is reported.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON and connected to internet
• Settings menu accessible
detailed_description: Navigate to Settings > System > Check for Updates. Initiate a manual firmware update check and verify the status is reported within 60 seconds.
detailed_expected_output: Checking' or 'Searching' text confirms the update check started. Result — 'up to date' or 'Update Available' — displayed within 60 seconds.

title: Verify silent standby OTA update
description: Enable automatic updates. Put TV in standby with update available. Verify update downloads and installs in standby.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON
• Automatic updates enabled in Settings
• Firmware update available on server
detailed_description: Enable automatic updates and put the TV in standby. Allow the update to download and install silently. After update completes, verify the TV wakes and the new firmware version is visible in System Information.
detailed_expected_output: TV wakes from standby with panel ON after update. New firmware version visible in System Information. Update completed without interruption.

title: Verify firmware version display post-update
description: After update, navigate to System Information and verify the new firmware version is displayed correctly.
preconditions: • TV is powered ON after a firmware update has been applied
detailed_description: After a firmware update, navigate to Settings > System > TV Information and verify the new firmware version number is displayed correctly.
detailed_expected_output: Version text found on TV Information screen. Version string matches the expected update target. Update completion confirmed.

title: Verify system stability post-update
description: After firmware update, perform basic functionality tests (power cycle, app launch, content playback).
preconditions: • TV is powered ON after firmware update has completed
detailed_description: After firmware update, run basic smoke tests: power cycle the TV and confirm Home Screen loads within 30 seconds, launch Netflix and confirm it opens, open Settings and navigate without crashes.
detailed_expected_output: Power cycle completes with Home Screen loading within 30 seconds. Netflix launches within 30 seconds. Settings navigable without crashes. Vizio Home Page active. No hangs or regressions.

title: Verify OOBE wizard launch on first boot
description: On first boot or after factory reset, verify the OOBE setup wizard launches automatically.
preconditions:
• TV on first boot or after factory reset
• No partial OOBE state from a previous run
detailed_description: Power on the TV after factory reset. Verify the OOBE setup wizard launches automatically within 30 seconds without any manual intervention. Confirm the first OOBE screen is displayed.
detailed_expected_output: Panel powers ON. OOBE first screen appears within 30 seconds. Non-blank screen confirmed. OOBE wizard auto-launched without user action.

title: Verify OOBE network setup flow
description: During OOBE, complete Wi-Fi network connection step successfully.
preconditions:
• TV in OOBE at the network setup step
• Wi-Fi network available with known SSID and password
detailed_description: During OOBE at the Wi-Fi setup step, select the known SSID from the network list, enter the password, and confirm connection. Verify 'Connected' status is shown and OOBE advances to the next step.
detailed_expected_output: Network setup screen appears during OOBE. Known SSID visible in list. Password accepted. 'Connected' text visible. OOBE advances past network setup step.

title: Verify OOBE account sign-in flow
description: During OOBE, complete (or skip) account sign-in step successfully.
preconditions:
• TV in OOBE at the account sign-in step
• Network not required — sign-in will be skipped
detailed_description: During OOBE at the account setup step, select the option to set up the account later and skip sign-in. Verify OOBE acknowledges the skip and advances to the next step without errors.
detailed_expected_output: Account sign-in or skip option presented. Skip acknowledged. OOBE advances to next step. No errors or hangs during account flow.

title: Verify OOBE completion and home screen
description: Complete all OOBE steps and verify the TV reaches the Vizio home screen.
preconditions:
• TV has just completed a factory reset and is booting into OOBE
• First OOBE screen 'Where is Your TV Located' is displaying
• No user account is signed in
• Network connection not required — account
detailed_description:
Complete all OOBE setup screens and verify the TV lands on the Home Screen.

Wait for the 'Where is Your TV Located' screen to appear. Navigate down to 'Living Room', confirm it is focused, and press Enter. Wait for the 'Your TV Has Been Named' screen to appear. Wait for the 'Get the most from your
detailed_expected_output: Each OOBE screen appears in sequence and is confirmed before proceeding: 'Where is Your TV Located', 'Your TV Has Been Named', 'Get the most from your TV', account setup screen. Home Screen 'APPS & IN

title: Verify SmartCast Home launch
description: Press Home button. Verify Vizio Home screen loads with content rows.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON
• Home Screen accessible via the Home key
detailed_description: Press the Home key on the remote. Verify the Vizio Home Screen loads within 15 seconds with 'APPS & INPUTS' visible. Confirm the active app is the Vizio Home Page. Verify D-pad navigation scrolls through content rows responsively.
detailed_expected_output: Home Screen loads within 15 seconds. 'APPS & INPUTS' text visible. Active app confirms Vizio Home Page. D-pad navigation responsive through content rows.

title: Verify WatchFree+ app launch
description: Launch WatchFree+ app. Verify it opens and live content streams correctly.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON and Home Screen is active
• Internet connection available
detailed_description: Launch the WatchFree+ app from the Home Screen. Verify the app opens and live content streams correctly within 30 seconds.
detailed_expected_output: WatchFree+ text visible within 30 seconds. Active video content displayed. Content is not stalled. Video playback confirmed active.

title: Verify Netflix app launch
description: Launch Netflix app. Verify it opens and UI loads successfully.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON and Home Screen is active
• Internet connection available
• Netflix app installed
detailed_description: Launch the Netflix app from the Home Screen. Verify the app opens and the Netflix UI loads successfully within 30 seconds.
detailed_expected_output: Netflix text detected within 30 seconds. Active app confirms Netflix. Non-blank screen. Netflix UI elements visible confirming full app load.

title: Verify YouTube app launch
description: Launch YouTube app. Verify it opens, loads content, and video playback works.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON and Home Screen is active
• Internet connection available
• YouTube app installed
detailed_description: Launch the YouTube app from the Home Screen. Verify the app opens, content loads, and video playback is active.
detailed_expected_output: YouTube text detected confirming app launch. Active app confirms YouTube. Media state confirms Playing. Video playback active and not stalled.

title: Verify Settings menu navigation
description: Open Settings menu and navigate through all main categories (Picture, Audio, Network, System).
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON
• Home Screen displaying ('APPS & INPUTS' visible)
• All Settings menu accessible via the Menu key
• No active dialog boxes or overlays on screen
detailed_description:
Open the Settings menu and navigate through all top-level Settings categories to verify each one opens correctly and the Back key returns to All Settings each time.

Press the Menu key from the Home Screen and navigate to All Settings, then enter it. The All Settings menu contains 10 top-level categ
detailed_expected_output: Picture, Audio, HDMI & Gaming, Network, Bluetooth and Remote, Antenna Channels, Accessibility, System, Support, and Privacy & Legal categories are all accessible. Each category loads its sub-menu item

title: Verify System Information display
description: Navigate to System Information. Verify all details (Model, Serial, Firmware, IP, MAC) are shown correctly.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON and Home Screen is active ('APPS & INPUTS' visible)
• TV has a valid serial number and firmware version in system info
• Settings menu accessible via the Menu key
detailed_description:
Navigate from the Home Screen to the TV Information screen and verify all key information fields are displayed correctly.

Press the Menu key and navigate to All Settings. Wait for 'Picture' to appear, confirming All Settings has loaded. Navigate down to System and enter it. Wait for 'TV Information
detailed_expected_output: All Settings loads confirmed by 'Picture' text. System menu loads confirmed by 'TV Information' text. TV Information screen loads confirmed by screen title. Model, Serial Number, and Version field lab

title: Verify Factory Reset execution
description: Initiate factory reset from Settings. Verify TV resets completely and returns to OOBE.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON and Settings accessible
• Any user data to be cleared has been backed up
detailed_description: Navigate to Settings > System > Reset & Admin (or equivalent) and initiate a factory reset. Confirm the reset confirmation dialog appears and proceed. Verify the TV reboots and the OOBE wizard launches automatically.
detailed_expected_output: Reset confirmation dialog displayed. TV reboots automatically. Panel powers back on. OOBE first screen appears confirming full factory reset. All user data cleared.

title: Verify Sleep Timer functionality
description: Set Sleep Timer. Verify TV automatically enters standby when timer expires.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON and content is playing
• Sleep Timer accessible via Settings
detailed_description: Navigate to Settings and set the Sleep Timer to the shortest available value. Confirm the timer is set. Wait for the timer to expire and verify the TV automatically enters standby.
detailed_expected_output: Sleep Timer set and confirmed via text search. TV enters standby automatically when timer expires — panel turns off and screen goes blank without user action.

title: Verify Parental Controls access
description: Navigate to Parental Controls. Verify menu is accessible and PIN protection works.
preconditions:
• TV is powered ON and Settings accessible
• Parental Controls PIN is known (use default if not changed)
detailed_description:
Verify TV display is ON using sysreg check for panel power.
Go to Home screen and confirm APPS & INPUTS is visible.
Open Quick Settings using Menu.
Confirm Quick Settings is open by finding All Settings.
Focus All Settings and press Enter.
Confirm All Settings root menu is loaded by finding Picture.
detailed_expected_output: Parental Controls menu accessible via Settings navigation. PIN entry screen presented. After PIN entry, content restriction settings visible. Rating, Restriction, and Block options confirmed. Back key
